name: update_sheet_export_group_members
desc: Update an existing sheet group by adding or removing sheets.

parameters.name: group_name
parameters.description: Name of the group to update.

parameters.name: add_sheets
parameters.description: Optional JSON array of sheet numbers to add, e.g. [\

parameters.name: remove_sheets
parameters.description: Optional JSON array of sheet numbers to remove, e.g. [\
